chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-526 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on MA No.13422/2023. For order on MA No.13423/2023. 18.02.2025 None present. On 21.01.2025 following order was passed:- “None present nor intimation received. Same was the position on last three consecutive dates of hearings which reflects that petitioner is not interested in the mater hence application is liable to be dismissed in non-prosecution. However, in the interest of justice same is adjourned to 18.2.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the petitioner.” Today also none is present nor intimation is received. In view of the above, listed applications are dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
